task: Look at this issue https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/319 and give me a good understanding and a potential fix.

And what are the comments about this:

Yes, this is very broken behavior, which has terrible consequences:

agents are extremely dumb
this burns through tokens because resubmitted conversation does not match the original one, so prefix caching does not work

please dig the code and give me a clear understanding.
proceed if you need to do more, commit push and create a PR.
